title: Grilled Snapper with Thai-Style Red Sauce
description: A flavorful and spicy dish from Thailand, featuring grilled snapper in a zesty red sauce. Perfect for a warm evening.

ingredients.name: Fixings for anticuchos
ingredients.notes: Typically includes onions, garlic, and aji amarillo peppers

instructions: Season snapper fillets with salt and pepper.
Grill snapper for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat Peruvian red sauce in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add fixings for anticuchos to the saucepan and sauté for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in fish sauce, soy sauce, honey, and ginger.
Simmer sauce for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve snapper with red sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with fresh citrusy herbs and lime wedges.
Serve with a side of grilled anticuchos, if desired.
Cook the anticuchos according to package instructions.
